name: table
title: Table
description: Data table with CSS grid layout, sorting, pagination, loading skeleton, row selection, and custom cell rendering.

consumption.typeImport: import type { TableProps, TableColumn, SortState, SortDirection, CellType, FilterValue, FilterState, PaginationState } from '@compomo/ui';

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Table. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.
